use_cases: Displaying product features on landing pages
Showing benefit statements in organized card layouts
Highlighting product differentiators in marketing sections
Creating scannable feature grids for quick comprehension
ai_summary: A features showcase component that arranges product capabilities in an organized card-based layout. Uses clean, minimalist Card primitives with header, title, description, content, and footer sections to present features in a scannable, visually balanced format. Designed for landing pages and marketing sections where clear feature communication is essential.
